translations.text: Well then we will see each other tomorrow.
خب پس فردا همدیگر را می‌بینیم.
Baş e hingê em sibê hev dibînin.

expressionEntries.teachingReason: “Na dann!” belongs in Expressions because learners need it as a fixed A1 social or pragmatic chunk, not as an ordinary literal practice sentence.
